global_description: A small, agile songbird with a distinctive bright yellow body and contrasting black hood. It has a slender, streamlined shape with a pointed beak and short tail. The wings and back are olive-green, providing a subtle contrast to the vibrant yellow underparts.
discriminative_attributes: Black hood covering head and throat

part_details.head: Covered in a black hood, contrasting with the yellow body.
part_details.body: Vibrant yellow underparts with an olive-green back.
part_details.beak: Short, pointed, suitable for insect catching.

spatial_relations: The black hood covers the head and throat, contrasting with the yellow body.
The olive-green wings are positioned on the sides of the yellow body.
The short tail extends from the rear of the body.
